description_long: This is a tall, slender stone obelisk with a distinctly Gothic architectural style, featuring pointed arches and intricate decorative elements along its shaft. The surface is adorned with ornate carvings, including small spire-like protrusions and detailed reliefs that run vertically up the structure. The base is rectangular and robust, supporting the weight of the obelisk and decorated with additional Gothic motifs and arches. The stone appears weathered, with varying shades of gray and subtle greenish patina, suggesting age and exposure to the elements. The tip of the obelisk is sharply pointed and continues the decorative theme with smaller finials and carved details. This monument would be a striking feature in an urban park, plaza, or near a historical building.
description: A tall, Gothic-style stone obelisk with ornate carvings, pointed arches, and a sharply tapered tip. The weathered surface and intricate details make it a prominent decorative monument.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main pointed arch and dense decorative carvings along the shaft.
description_view_1: Side view with visible vertical reliefs and a slightly different arrangement of spire-like protrusions.
description_view_2: Rear view with a lighter stone appearance and symmetrical Gothic motifs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, highlighting the pointed arch and less shadowed surface details.
attribute_ornamentation: Extensive Gothic ornamentation including pointed arches, spire-like protrusions, and vertical relief carvings along the shaft and base.
attribute_base_design: Rectangular stone base with prominent Gothic arches and decorative reliefs, providing a sturdy and ornate foundation.
attribute_tip_design: Sharply pointed tip with smaller finials and carved details, continuing the Gothic decorative theme.
